subject: Add helmchart for policy/api component
commit_message:
Add helmchart for policy/api component

Added helmchart for policy-api component.

Issue-ID: POLICY-1270
Change-Id: I419f6ba38aaa8161199f09a3dfcc892c6a7bb952
Signed-off-by: Chenfei Gao <cgao@research.att.com>
Signed-off-by: Jorge Hernandez <jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Approving it.
There is a comment from Borislav Glozman on my review for PAP. If possible, please check.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

His comment is on the service.yaml - I am not familiar enough. So I need Jorge, Ram and Chenfei to make those changes.

Also, we need to be sure that this wiki page is updated for node ports since we are introducing new components here:

https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/OOM+NodePort+List

I'm holding this up until those 2 issues are resolved. Thanks!

Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 3:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1689/

Patch Set 3: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1689/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1689

Patch Set 3:

Added some changes on top of Chenfei's trying to honor Borislav's comments in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/79102/:

policy-api is configured as a clusterIP service.   There's no initial intent to expose this port externally.  Nevertheless, the 30440 port (304 prefix is for ports that are not used at runtime unless enabled through configuration) is supported if we decide to make the switch to a NodePort in the future.
